{% raw %}
{% endraw %} {% raw %}
{% endraw %}

define rotor dimensions and calculate attributes

{% raw %}

class rotor[source]

rotor(OD, Np, g, ID, magnet_pitch_f, magnet_thickness_f, len)

{% endraw %} {% raw %}
{% endraw %} {% raw %} 
OD = 73
Np = 10
g = 0.9
ID = 30
magnet_pitch_f = 0.83
magnet_thickness_f = 2*4/(OD-ID)
r1 = rotor(OD, Np, g, ID, magnet_pitch_f, magnet_thickness_f, len)
r1.calc_area()

print('Cross section area of \n core: {0:.2f}\n magnet: {0:.2f}'.format(r1.core_area, r1.magnet_area))

magnet thickness  4.0
Cross section area of 
 core: 10.00
 magnet: 10.00
{% endraw %}
